articles.title: Strong fourth quarter results and record-high production
articles.snippet: (Oslo, Norway, 5 March 2026) – Statkraft delivered strong underlying results in the fourth quarter of 2025, driven by higher Nordic power prices and record-high production. For the full year, production exceeded 70 TWh for the first time, while continued cost…

[0.33] Strong fourth quarter results and record-high production
(Oslo, Norway, 5 March 2026) – Statkraft delivered strong underlying results in the fourth quarter of 2025, driven by higher Nordic power prices and record-high production. For the full year, production exceeded 70 TWh for the first time, while continued cost…
